---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Summary

Describe the requested feature clearly.

## Why Is This Useful?

Explain the problem this feature solves or the value it adds.

## Suggested Solution

Describe how you think this could be implemented.

## Related Module or Area

Examples: data loading, EDA, preprocessing, modeling, dashboard, documentation.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Notes

Add links, examples, or screenshots if useful.
